title: aria subulata
intro: Aria subulata, also known as the 'Hairy Broom Sedge', is a low-growing, flowering plant species within the Carex genus. It is often used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and easing respiratory issues. Aria subulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
